violations.text: Liquid waste was observed leaking from the bottom of the toilets in both restrooms. The floor drain by the back exit door was observed leaking. Restrooms have been placed out of order. Establishment is to clean and sanitize bathrooms, and area around back floor drain as often as necessary to keep them dry and sanitized. Establishment has scheduled service for restrooms on 2/16/26. Establishment is to keep restroom closed until service company corrected drainage issue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

The bathroom floors and area around the back door were observed contaminated with waste water. Establishment is to clean and sanitize areas as often and needed to keep them dry and sanitized. Establishment is to change/dispose of mop head after every cleaning. Establishment is to use sanitizer effective in eliminating norovirus. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The ceiling tiles at the 3 bay sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Facilities must be maintained in a condition that promotes handwashing and restricted for that use. Convenient accessibility of a handwashing facility encourages timely. handwashing which provides a break. Sinks used for ware-washing can become sources of contamination if used as handwashing facilities by employees returning from the toilet or from duties which have contaminated their hands. Hand sinks located at the bathrooms are in poor repair. Water is not available. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
The hand sink and 3 bay sink not plumbed to have hot water. Hot water shall be available throughout the establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The ceiling tiles at the 3 bay sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Facilities must be maintained in a condition that promotes handwashing and restricted for that use. Convenient accessibility of a handwashing facility encourages timely. handwashing which provides a break. Sinks used for ware-washing can become sources of contamination if used as handwashing facilities by employees returning from the toilet or from duties which have contaminated their hands. Hand sinks located at the bathrooms are in poor repair. Water is not available. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023
The hand sink and 3 bay sink not plumbed to have hot water. Hot water shall be available throughout the establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
The door to the employee/customer toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
The ceiling tiles at the 3 bay sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
